name:name: # ^   BaseStats (from core CoreTypes.tsv) provides: attack, defense, speed
# ^   Localizable (from core CoreTypes.tsv) provides: displayName, description
# ^   difficulty is the child's own field
# ^ The two parent record types have no overlapping fields, so the merge is clean.
# ^ This pattern is useful for combining structural data with localization data,
# ^ e.g., when translations are maintained in a separate file and "joined into"
# ^ the main data at export time.
shadowLord
description:text: The lord of the shadow realm, master of darkness

name:name: infernalGuardian
description:text: An ancient fire guardian bound to protect the realm gate

name:name: lightbringer
description:text: The primordial being of pure light, final boss of the expansion
